title: README fixture pattern inconsistency: include_str! vs fs::read_to_string
description: fixtures/README.md line 121 tells contributors to load fixtures with include_str!, but every test in methods_test.rs uses fs::read_to_string via a fixture() helper. The two patterns have different failure modes: include_str! fails at compile time (immediate), fs::read_to_string fails at runtime (silent in CI if fixture is missing). Contributors adding tests will fork on which pattern to copy, creating a permanent split that generates repeated review comments.
